query:
UPDATE purchase_records
SET bookingSlot = CASE
  WHEN HOUR(date) < 12 THEN 'утро'
  WHEN HOUR(date) < 17 THEN 'обед'
  ELSE 'вечер'
END
WHERE bookingSlot IS NULL;
